title: LuckSMP replica
description: This is Luck SMP unofficial replica
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b33312af488bdeb761f5acfe06b4b46f0130069e.png)                                                                                                                                                                                   
                                         
  A luck-based PvP plugin that rewards skill and risk with powerful, proc-based abilities.                                                                                                      
                                                                                                                                                                                                
  Kill players to earn Luck Books — mysterious tomes that grant one of 12 unique abilities. Manage your Luck Points to unlock slots, sacrifice books to shift your fortune, and dominate with   
  devastating combat effects.                                                                                                                                                                   

## Availible items
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6caa95af9d9a2343f574c562c70851cba489e5cc.png)

  ---
##  How It Works

  Kill a player → a golden ʟᴜᴄᴋ ʙᴏᴏᴋ drops. Right-click it to discover your fate — you'll randomly receive one of 12 powerful Luck Books, placed into your available slots.

  Die → lose a Luck Point. Your luck determines how many book slots you can hold:

  - 1+ points → 3 slots
  - 0 to -1 points → 2 slots
  - -2 points → 1 slot
  - -3 or less → 0 slots

  Use /badluck to sacrifice a book for a chance to recover your luck.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7960501bec645e784d56944f6dd22ebcb4e1be8.png)

  ---
##  Commands

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf706889525790dbed8fecf31e37ccda59417051.png)

  - /luck — View your luck points and available slots
  - /badluck — Sacrifice a book to improve your luck
  - /luckbooks — Open your luck books GUI
  - /giveluckbook <player> <book> — Admin: give a specific book

  ---
  Features

  - Paper 1.21+ — built for modern Minecraft
  - Fully configurable — every proc chance, duration, and message can be customized
  - Persistent data — luck points and books saved across restarts
  - Clean GUI — visual slot system with locked/unlocked/filled indicators
  - Lightweight — event-driven with no ticking overhead when abilities aren't active

  ---
  Configuration

  All proc chances are adjustable in config.yml. Every player-facing message is customizable in messages.yml with full color code support.

  ---
  Drop into your plugins folder and let luck decide the rest.
